app.name: AQI Sentinel
landing.hero_subtitle: AI-Powered Urban Air Quality Intelligence for Smarter Cities
landing.hero_bullets: Real-time source attribution • Hyperlocal forecasting • Evidence-based enforcement • Personalized citizen guidance
landing.what_we_do_sub: Four pillars that connect satellite evidence, city sensors, and operational action.
landing.feature.attribution.title: Source Attribution
landing.feature.attribution.body: Pinpoint whether pollution comes from construction, traffic, industry, or burning using satellite, sensor, and geospatial data.
landing.feature.forecast.title: Hyperlocal Forecasting
landing.feature.forecast.body: 24-hour AQI predictions at street level so authorities can act before pollution spikes.
landing.feature.enforcement.title: Enforcement Intelligence
landing.feature.enforcement.body: Prioritized, evidence-backed recommendations with clear actions for pollution control boards and municipal teams.
landing.feature.citizen.title: Citizen Guidance
landing.feature.citizen.body: Personalized neighborhood recommendations based on AQI, rent, commute, schools, hospitals, and parks.
landing.data_we_use_sub: Transparency first — every recommendation is grounded in public sensors, satellites, geospatial layers, weather, and open housing signals.
landing.data.cpcb.title: CPCB & KSPCB Sensors
landing.data.satellite.title: Sentinel-5P & FIRMS Satellite
landing.data.satellite.body: NO₂ levels and active fire/burning detection
landing.data.osm.title: OpenStreetMap + H3 Grid
landing.data.osm.body: Road density, land use, construction sites, and vulnerability hotspots
landing.data.weather.title: Open-Meteo Weather
landing.data.weather.body: Wind patterns that move pollution across the city
landing.data.rent.title: MagicBricks Rental Data
landing.data.rent.body: Real housing costs for citizen recommendations
landing.choose_role_sub: Tell us who you are so we open the right workspace. Judges: use Guest mode for the fastest full-product tour.
landing.role.enforcement.title: Enforcement Authority
landing.role.enforcement.desc: For pollution control boards, municipal corporations, and police
landing.role.citizen.title: Citizen
landing.role.citizen.desc: Find better places to live based on air quality and livability
landing.role.guest.title: Guest / Judge Mode
landing.role.guest.desc: Quick demo access for judges and evaluators
landing.name: Name
landing.accept_terms: I accept the terms and data notice
landing.error.name: Please enter your name.
landing.error.phone: Please enter a valid phone number.
landing.error.terms: Please accept the terms to continue.
copilot.title: AQI Sentinel Copilot
copilot.empty_body: Ask about enforcement, pollution sources, policy, or what-if scenarios.
copilot.empty_map_active: Map context is active — answers will prefer this area.
copilot.empty_map_hint: Select an area on the Map and tap “Ask Copilot” for location-aware answers.
copilot.placeholder: Ask about pollution, enforcement, policy, or what-if scenarios…
copilot.placeholder_map: Ask about this area, run a what-if, or follow up…
copilot.error.empty_body: Copilot returned an empty answer. Check that the API is running and LLM keys are configured.
copilot.error.limited: Limited response — try a more specific place, what-if scenario, or topic.
copilot.error.malformed_body: Received an unexpected response format. Please try again.
copilot.error.timeout_chat: ⏱ Timed out waiting for Copilot. Try again, or ask a shorter question.
copilot.error.network_chat: 🔌 Network error — the API may be offline. Start the backend and retry.
copilot.error.timeout: Timed out waiting for Copilot (90s). Try again or simplify the question.
copilot.error.network: Network error — could not reach the API. Check that the backend is running and try again.
